# Cornelia Trompke Consulting & Coaching

> Trauma-informed executive coaching and leadership development for senior executives, founders, and board members — grounded in nervous system science, built for lasting transformation. Based in Berlin, working globally.

## About

Cornelia Trompke is an executive advisor, trauma-informed coach, and systemic thinker with over two decades at the intersection of executive leadership, depth psychology, and neuroscience. She works with a deliberately small number of senior leaders and organisations at any one time, offering a depth and quality of engagement that is genuinely rare.

Her work draws on two primary methodologies: NARM (NeuroAffective Relational Model), developed by Dr. Laurence Heller, and Integral Coaching, developed at New Ventures West. Together, these create a form of leadership transformation that goes beyond behaviour change — addressing nervous system, identity, and the relational patterns that shape how leaders function under pressure.

## Services

- [Executive Coaching & Advisory](https://corneliatrompke.com/executive-coaching): A sustained, deeply confidential 1:1 coaching partnership for senior executives, founders, and board members. 6–12 months, biweekly sessions, in person or virtual.

- [Executive Retreats](https://corneliatrompke.com/executive-retreats): Immersive 3–5 day residential retreat format for individual leaders or small groups. Combining guided meditation practice, structured reflection, and deep dialogue at selected locations across Germany and Europe.

- [Leadership Team Facilitation](https://corneliatrompke.com/leadership-team-facilitation): Deep facilitation work with executive leadership teams of 4–12 people navigating complexity, conflict, and the invisible relational dynamics shaping collective performance.

- [Organizational Advisory for People & Culture Transformation](https://corneliatrompke.com/organizational-advisory): Strategic advisory for organisations at genuine inflection points — addressing leadership, people systems, and culture simultaneously across a minimum 6-month engagement.

## Methodology

- [How I Work — The Method](https://corneliatrompke.com/how-i-work): NARM and Integral Coaching explained in depth — what they are, why they work together, and what changes when the work goes deep.

## Contact

- [Start a Conversation](https://corneliatrompke.com/contact): All enquiries receive a personal response within 2–3 business days. Based in Berlin, Germany. Working in German and English.

## Key Facts

- Location: Berlin, Germany
- Working globally (in person and virtual)
- Languages: German and English
- Client profile: Senior executives, founders, board members, leadership teams, organisations at inflection points
- Methodologies: NARM (NeuroAffective Relational Model), Integral Coaching (New Ventures West), Systemic Facilitation
- Engagement length: Minimum 6 months for 1:1 coaching; minimum 6 months for organisational advisory
